cases.question: How much does the AR-7 cost and what payload can it carry?
cases.expected_fact: AR-7 costs 42,000 dollars and carries up to 18 kg

cases.question: Who founded Atlas Robotics and when?
cases.expected_fact: Founded 2019 by Meera Iyer and Daniel Okafor

cases.question: What happens when lidar calibration drifts too far?
cases.expected_fact: Robot halts and reports error code E-114 beyond 2 degrees drift

cases.question: When is premium support free?
cases.expected_fact: Free for fleets of 25 or more robots

cases.question: Compare the AR-3 and AR-7 payload limits.
